requirement_topic.en: Transport and handling — UN 38.3 testing and Indonesia-side dangerous-goods logistics
requirement_topic.zh: 运输与搬运——UN 38.3 测试与印尼目的地危险品物流
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸與搬運——UN 38.3 測試與印尼目的地危險品物流

summary.en: Lithium batteries are treated as dangerous goods for transport. Before shipping to Indonesia, exporters need a valid UN 38.3 test report for all lithium cells, battery packs, and power banks. For sea leg, IMDG Class 9 handling of UN 3480 / UN 3481 applies. For air, IATA DGR and ICAO technical standards apply, including state-of-charge and packaging controls. For Indonesian acceptance logistics, exporters should also ensure destination-side dangerous-goods documentation, marking, and carrier coordination for customs and terminal handling at major Indonesian ports.
summary.zh: 锂电池运输被归为危险品。出口到印尼前，锂电芯、电池组及移动电源通常需持有有效 UN 38.3 测试报告。海运按 IMDG 第9类处理 UN 3480/UN 3481；空运受 IATA DGR 与 ICAO 技术规程约束，包括荷电状态和包装控制。进入印尼后还需满足目的地危险品文件、标识和承运人协调要求，尤其在主要口岸处理环节。
summary.zht: 鋰電池運輸被歸為危險品。出口到印尼前，鋰電芯、電池組及行動電源通常需持有有效 UN 38.3 測試報告。海運按 IMDG 第9類處理 UN 3480/UN 3481；空運受 IATA DGR 與 ICAO 技術規程約束，包括荷電狀態和包裝控制。進入印尼後還需滿足目的地危險品文件、標識和承運人協調要求，尤其在主要口岸處理環節。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries
ICAO Technical Instructions for the Safe Transport of Dangerous Goods by Air and IATA DGR
IMDG Code for sea transport of UN 3480 / UN 3481
Destination-side dangerous goods handling procedures for Indonesian ports

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 for air transport in line with ICAO and CAAC practices and applies IMDG/air rules similarly for outbound movement. Chinese exporters already align with much of the test and dangerous-goods framework, but destination-side manifesting, terminal format, and acceptance language are often local to Indonesia.
summary.zh: 中国按 ICAO 和 CAAC 实务要求空运货物提供 UN 38.3，海空运规则与 IMDG 一致地适用于对外运输。中国出口商通常已符合大部分测试和危险品框架，但目的地文件格式、港口舱单和验收流程仍以印尼本地为准。
summary.zht: 中國按 ICAO 和 CAAC 實務要求空運貨物提供 UN 38.3，海空運規則與 IMDG 一致地適用於對外運輸。中國出口商通常已符合大部分測試和危險品框架，但目的地文件格式、港口艙單和驗收流程仍以印尼本地為準。

standards_or_laws: GB 31168 and domestic dangerous-goods road classification framework for internal Chinese logistics
IMDG/ICAO-aligned global dangerous-goods baseline used by Chinese exporters

gap.en: The safety test package often transfers because UN 38.3 is harmonised. The gap is mostly destination-side execution: Indonesian customs and terminal teams require matching local documentation and handling arrangements, and freight plans should account for entry via Jakarta or Surabaya logistics channels where applicable. Chinese domestic export paperwork does not fully substitute for Indonesia-side dangerous-goods process control.
gap.zh: 由于 UN 38.3 属于国际通行标准，测试包可在很大程度上复用。实际差距主要在目的地执行层面：印尼海关和码头环节要求匹配的本地文件与处理流程，并需要按雅加达或泗水等物流通道制定运单及接收安排。中国国内出口单据不能完全替代印尼的危险品流程控制。
gap.zht: 由於 UN 38.3 屬於國際通行標準，測試包可在很大程度上複用。實際差距主要在目的地執行層面：印尼海關和碼頭環節要求匹配的本地文件與處理流程，並需要按雅加達或泗水等物流通道制定運單及接收安排。中國國內出口單據不能完全替代印尼的危險品流程控制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for transport safety and import acceptance. UN 38.3 plus dangerous-goods handling documentation are required across air and sea exports to Indonesia.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for international transport in China practice as well, with UN 38.3 required for air movement and IMDG/CNCA-linked dangerous-goods workflows for internal movement.

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) and IATA dangerous-goods framework references

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Transport remains largely harmonized through UN 38.3, IMDG, and IATA/ICAO controls, so Chinese exporters are often technically aligned. The practical Indonesia gap is not the test standard itself but the destination-side dangerous-goods paper flow, acceptance format, and terminal coordination for the shipment route to Indonesia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 运输要求在 UN 38.3、IMDG 和 IATA/ICAO 框架下高度一致，中国出口商通常在测试层面已接近符合。印度尼西亚差距通常不在测试标准本身，而在于目的地危险品文件流程、验收格式和运输到印尼航线的码头协调。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 運輸要求在 UN 38.3、IMDG 和 IATA/ICAO 框架下高度一致，中國出口商通常在測試層面已接近符合。印尼差距通常不在測試標準本身，而在於目的地危險品文件流程、驗收格式和運輸到印尼航線的碼頭協調。
